_description: Centralized pricing for all models used by GEPS v5 benchmark and continuous runner. Prices in USD per 1M tokens. CLI models (Claude, GPT, Kimi) are subscription-based with high limits — treat as effectively unlimited for cost estimation purposes. Only OpenRouter-only models (glm-5, minimax-m2.5) and Google API models incur per-token costs.
_routing_philosophy: CLI-first: always prefer native CLIs (claude, codex, kimi) over API routes. These are subscription-based — no marginal cost per token, high rate limits. Never downgrade model quality to save a few dollars on API costs. Use /CodexCode swarm for token-intensive grunt work. Google API for Gemini models (grounding + thinking support). OpenRouter only for models without CLI access (glm-5, minimax-m2.5).

opus._note: Subscription via Claude CLI. Per-token prices only apply if OpenRouter fallback is used.

chatgpt-5.4._note: Subscription via Codex CLI (reasoning_effort=xhigh). Best for /CodexCode swarm token-intensive tasks. Per-token prices only apply if OpenRouter fallback is used.

gpt-5.2._note: Subscription via Codex CLI (reasoning_effort=xhigh). Per-token prices only apply if OpenRouter fallback is used.

gemini-3-flash._note: Google API primary (thinkingLevel=HIGH + grounding). OpenRouter fallback without grounding.

kimi-2.5._note: Subscription via Kimi CLI (--thinking flag). Per-token prices only apply if OpenRouter/Moonshot fallback is used.

glm-5._note: OpenRouter only. No CLI available. Built-in <think> reasoning.

minimax-m2.5._note: OpenRouter only. No CLI available. Built-in <think> reasoning.
